Company Overview

Med & Skin SRL

Premium Aesthetic Solutions  •  Benelux  •  UK  •  France

Premium distributor of professional cosmetics and aesthetic medicine solutions across Benelux, the United Kingdom and France. Founded in Brussels in 2017.

Med & Skin SRL is a fast-growing distribution company specialising in the wholesale of professional cosmetics and aesthetic medicine products, combining injectable medicine with world-class cosmeceutical brands to deliver modern, reliable technologies and visible results.

www.med-skin.be ↗ info@med-skin.be +32 471 30 77 52

Diversified aesthetic portfolio & structured market expansion

Company timeline
2017
Med & Skin founded in Brussels. Launch of injectable product distribution.
2018
Exclusive Benelux distributor for Apriline, Medic Control Peel, Mesaltera, Skinasil and DSD de Luxe.
2019
Relocated to new office with dedicated training rooms. Exclusive distribution of WiQo Med / PRX‑T33® for Belgium & Luxembourg.
2020
Opened branches in Paris and London. Exclusive distributor of Holy Land for Belgium, Luxembourg, France and the UK.
2021–2025
Launched online store, expanded Skin Tech distribution, broadened portfolio, training centres and international congress participation.
Education, Congresses & Market Activity

Active educator & international distributor representative

Med & Skin combines distribution with continuous education, representing brand partners at leading congresses and delivering hands-on seminars across Europe.
